zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Norwich於1274年出生在英國諾福爾可斯克爾索普時，他的父親Geoffrey Norwich19歲，母親Mrs. Geoffrey Norwich20歲。他於1305年與Catherine de Hethersett在紐西蘭坎特布瑞斯托克結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1328年被列為chief baron of the exchequer。他去世於1329年2月20日在英國素福爾可梅廷加姆享年55歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可諾維其諾維其 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Norwich于1274年出生在英国諾福爾可斯克爾索普时，他的父亲Geoffrey Norwich19岁，母亲Mrs. Geoffrey Norwich20岁。他于1305年与Catherine de Hethersett在新西兰坎特布瑞斯托克结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1328年被列为chief baron of the exchequer。他去世于1329年2月20日在英国素福爾可梅廷加姆享年55岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可諾維其諾維其 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Norwich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): habitational name from the city of Norwich in Norfolk. The placename derives from Old English north ‘north, northern’ + wīc ‘specialized or outlying farm’.

variants.name: Northridge
meanings: English (Derbyshire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Norridge in Upton Scudamore (Wiltshire) or from a similarly named but unidentified places elsewhere. The placename derives from Middle English north ‘north’ + rigge ‘ridge’ (Old English north, hrycg). There may have been some confusion with Norwich .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Norwich was born in 1274, in Sculthorpe, Norfolk, England, his father, Geoffrey Norwich, was 19 and his mother, Mrs. Geoffrey Norwich, was 20. He married Catherine de Hethersett in 1305, in Stoke, Canterbury, New Zealand. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. In 1328, at the age of 54, his occupation is listed as chief baron of the exchequer. He died on 20 February 1329, in Mettingham, Suffolk, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Norwich est né en 1274, à Sculthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey Norwich, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Geoffrey Norwich, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Catherine de Hethersett en 1305, à Stoke, Canterbury, Nouvelle-Zélande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. En 1328, à l’âge de 54 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est chief baron of the exchequer. Il est décédé le 20 février 1329, à Mettingham, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Norwich 1274 in Sculthorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey Norwich 19 und seine Mutter Mrs. Geoffrey Norwich 20. Er hat 1305 in Stoke, Canterbury, Neuseeland Catherine de Hethersett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1328, als er 54 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als chief baron of the exchequer aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. Februar 1329 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Mettingham, Suffolk, England und wurde in Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Norwich è nato il nel 1274 nel Sculthorpe, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Geoffrey Norwich, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Geoffrey Norwich, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Catherine de Hethersett nel 1305, nel Stoke, Canterbury, Nuova Zelanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1328, all'età di 54 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come chief baron of the exchequer. Morì il 20 febbraio 1329, nel Mettingham, Suffolk, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Norwichが1274年にイギリスノーフォルクスクウルソルペで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Norwichは19歳，母Mrs. Geoffrey Norwichは20歳であった。1305年にニュージーランドカンテルブリーストクでCatherine de Hethersettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1328年，54歳の時，職業はchief baron of the exchequerと記録されている。彼は1329年2月20日にイギリススフォルクメッティンガムで55歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクノーウィチノーウィチ カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Norwich(이)가 1274년 영국 노르폴크 스컬소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey Norwich(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Geoffrey Norwich(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1305년 뉴질랜드 캉르버이 스토크에서 Catherine de Hethersett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1328년, 54세의 나이로 그의 직업은 chief baron of the exchequer이었다. 그는 1329년 2월 20일 영국 수폴크 멧틴그함에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 노위치 노위치 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Norwich nasceu em 1274, em Sculthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey Norwich, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Geoffrey Norwich, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine de Hethersett em 1305, em Stoke, Canterbury, Nova Zelândia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1328, com 54 anos, sua profissão aparece como chief baron of the exchequer. Ele faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1329, em Mettingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Norwich родился в 1274 г. в местности скултаурп, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey Norwich было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Geoffrey Norwich, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine de Hethersett в 1305 г. в местности сток, кантирбури, Новая Зеландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. В 1328 году, в возрасте 54 лет,  он работал по профессии chief baron of the exchequer. Он умер 20 февраля 1329 г. в местности меттингхам, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности норвич кэтедраль, норвич, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Norwich nació en 1274, en Sculthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey Norwich, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Mrs. Geoffrey Norwich, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Catherine de Hethersett en 1305, en Stoke, Canterbury, Nueva Zelanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1328, a la edad de 54 años, su ocupación registrada era chief baron of the exchequer. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1329, en Mettingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
